description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow with a flat, multi-level roof and a spacious layout. The exterior is predominantly white with large, rectangular windows arranged in a regular pattern, providing ample natural light. The backyard features a sizable swimming pool, surrounded by green lawn, palm trees, and several lounge chairs, creating a resort-like atmosphere. There is a covered patio area with outdoor furniture, as well as a separate shaded structure near the pool. The front of the bungalow includes a driveway with space for multiple cars and landscaped greenery. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on open outdoor living spaces and functional luxury.
description: A modern, white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a swimming pool, and landscaped outdoor areas, exuding a luxurious and contemporary feel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the covered patio, part of the pool, and a landscaped area with a tree.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full swimming pool, palm trees, lounge chairs, and the main outdoor living space.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the driveway with parked cars, main entrance, and more windows.
description_view_3: Front view with the driveway, three parked cars, and landscaped greenery with bushes and trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
